betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Conduit Probe is an incredibly useful tool for managing and troubleshooting your Ender IO conduit networks.

It features two modes:

• §lProbe Mode§r
Right-click an Energy Conduit to view detailed network information
Right-click an Item Conduit to simulate item transport using the item in your hand
Right-click a Redstone Conduit to see connection details, including signal levels sent and received

• §lCopy/Paste Mode§r
Shift + Right-click a conduit connection to copy its settings
Right-click another conduit to paste those settings

This is especially useful when configuring multiple machines with identical setups and helps prevent mistakes.

You can switch between modes by: Using Shift + Mouse Wheel, or pressing the §nYeta Wrench Mode§r keybind (unbound by default) while holding the probe.
